title: Crying Obsidian Recipe
description: Now craft your own crying obsidian
body:
💧 Crying Obsidian Recipe Datapack  
Craft dimensional tears—no ruined portals or piglin bartering required!  
This datapack introduces a custom recipe for Crying Obsidian, letting players convert standard Obsidian and Purple Dye into respawn anchor fuel or decorative blocks.

✨ Features  
✅ Shapeless recipe using 1 Obsidian + 1 Purple Dye 
🧩 Lore-friendly integration with corrupted dye infusion and portal residue  
🔁 Modular JSON structure for easy editing and expansion  
🛠️ Compatible with Minecraft 1.16+
